name: ddl-idempotent-enhancement
description: Enhance tableDefToCreateTableSQL() to support IF NOT EXISTS option. Add generateSQLIdempotent(schema, dialect) that wraps CREATE TABLE with IF NOT EXISTS. Alternatively, add ifNotExists parameter to generateSQL() function for migration-safe DDL generation.
rationale: REQ-09 ddl-execution-integration. Idempotent migrations for safe re-runs of db.migrate.
